name: STANDARDS-URLS registry accepts an entry with all six operator-facing fields populated per section 2.6
setup:
printf '%b
' '- id: google-tsguide
  name: Google TypeScript Style Guide
  url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript, react]
  fetch_frequency: daily' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
